utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items required in the format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, price, features, viewing) – fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (method, amount, timeline, remaining equity) – fully specified. 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, cost, timeline) – fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, cost, specialization) – fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services – includes services and associated costs; while not traditional utilities, it provides setup/management offerings; acceptable as specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – includes purchase, one-time services itemized, total initial investment, monthly ongoing costs, remaining equity – fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to identify items in the final property solution that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings. The final solution includes: a property purchase, a financing method, legal services, moving services, setup/surveys, a concierge search service, and an ongoing premium management service. The specific property address does not match any property in the ratings list, so no rating is mapped for it.
